nodes.title: Positiv
widgets_values:
Extreme close-up photograph of a single human eye, filling most of the frame. The eye is open and looking directly toward the camera. Highly detailed iris with intricate radial fibers, subtle natural color variations, a clearly defined pupil and a realistic wet surface. Sharp eyelashes, visible eyelid texture, fine pores and tiny skin hairs around the eye. A soft rectangular window reflection is visible on the cornea, with a small natural catchlight. Neutral expression, realistic anatomy, natural asymmetry, unretouched skin, physically plausible lighting.

Soft diffused daylight coming from one side, gentle shadows, neutral gray background, shallow depth of field. The iris and the front eyelashes are in precise focus while the surrounding skin gradually becomes softer. Macro photography, approximately 100 mm macro lens, high dynamic range, realistic color reproduction, documentary photography, no makeup, no stylization, no text, no decorative elements.

nodes.title: Negativ
widgets_values: two eyes, multiple eyes, extra pupil, double pupil, malformed iris, distorted eye, asymmetric pupil, cross-eyed, closed eye, partially closed eye, missing eyelashes, fused eyelashes, artificial eyelashes, heavy makeup, eyeliner, eyeshadow, contact lens pattern, glowing eye, fantasy eye, cybernetic eye, animal eye, doll eye, plastic skin, waxy skin, airbrushed skin, excessive skin smoothing, oversaturated colors, extreme contrast, harsh flash, excessive reflections, obscured iris, blurry iris, out of focus, low detail, low resolution, compression artifacts, noise, illustration, painting, anime, cartoon, 3D render, CGI, text, watermark, logo, frame

nodes.title: ⚙️ Einstellungen
widgets_values:
=== UltraReal FineTune v4 (SDXL) ===

Auflösung: 1024x1024 (oder 832x1216 / 1216x832). KEINE 512er Auflösung bei SDXL.

CFG 4-6, Steps 30-35, dpmpp_2m_sde + karras.

Realistic-SDXL: Natürliche Sätze + ein paar Quality-Tags. CLIP-Skip -2 (oder -1 testen). Externe sdxl_vae empfohlen.

Refiner: nicht nötig. Für mehr Schärfe optional Hi-Res-Fix (Upscale Latent x1.5 + 2. KSampler, denoise 0.4-0.5).

--- WICHTIG (Fehler 'NoneType has no attribute clone') ---
Dieser Fehler hatte NICHTS mit dem Workflow zu tun: Im Checkpoint-Loader
war ein FLUX- bzw. Z-Image-Modell ausgewaehlt (Log: 'model_type FLUX/FLOW',
'no CLIP/text encoder weights in checkpoint'). Solche Modelle haben keinen
eingebauten CLIP -> der CLIP-Skip-Knoten bekam None und ist gecrasht.

NUR echte SDXL-Checkpoints in diesen Loader laden!
FLUX/Z-Image/Krea/Boogu/Anima brauchen ihre EIGENEN Workflows
(separater CLIPLoader + VAE), nicht CheckpointLoaderSimple.

Robustheit: CLIPSetLastLayer wurde entfernt, CLIP geht jetzt direkt vom
Checkpoint in beide Text-Encodes. Damit kann dieser Knoten nicht mehr
crashen. CLIP-Skip -2 ist bei modernen realistischen SDXL-Finetunes
ohnehin optional. Wer ihn doch will: CLIPSetLastLayer (stop_at -2)
wieder zwischen Checkpoint.CLIP und die Encodes haengen.
